articles.author: Sam Borden
articles.title: USMNT sees off Australia to advance to World Cup knockout stage - ESPN
articles.description: The U.S. shook off the absence of Christian Pulisic to beat Australia 2-0 in Seattle on Friday and clinch a spot in the World Cup knockout rounds.
articles.content:
SEATTLE -- No Christian Pulisic? No problem.
The United States men's national team, playing without its injured star attacker, continued its captivating surge in this World Cup on Friday, beating Au… [+4533 chars]
